Package neqsim.process.operations.envelope

Class TripPrediction

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.operations.envelope.TripPrediction
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<TripPrediction>
public final class TripPrediction extends Object implements Serializable, Comparable<TripPrediction>
Advisory prediction that a margin may reach its limit within a time horizon.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • TripPrediction

      public TripPrediction(OperationalMargin margin, double estimatedTimeToLimitSeconds, double confidence, String trendDescription)
      Creates a trip prediction.
      Parameters:
      margin - margin that is trending toward a limit
      estimatedTimeToLimitSeconds - estimated time to zero margin in seconds
      confidence - confidence from 0.0 to 1.0
      trendDescription - short trend description

  • Method Details

    • classify

      public static TripPrediction.Severity classify(double seconds)
      Classifies a prediction by estimated time to limit.
      Parameters:
      seconds - estimated time to limit in seconds
      Returns:
      prediction severity
